# @aai-agency/og-components

> Production-grade O&G React components, agent-first. Maps, charts, detail cards, selection panels, overlay management, validation schemas, and data persistence. Free, open source, MIT. By AAI Agency.

## Install

```
pnpm add @aai-agency/og-components mapbox-gl
```

Requires: React 18+, Tailwind CSS 4+, mapbox-gl 3+, Mapbox access token

## Setup

```css
@import "@aai-agency/og-components/styles.css";
```

```ts
import "mapbox-gl/dist/mapbox-gl.css";
```

## Components

- Map — Interactive asset map with deck.gl, clustering, overlays, drawing tools, lasso selection
- LineChart — High-performance time series chart with dual Y-axis
- ForecastLineChart — LineChart with a DCA-driven forecast overlay (auto-fit or explicit per-fluid config)
- ProductionChart — Oil/gas/water production chart with annotations and brush zoom
- AssetDetailCard — Expandable detail panel for any asset, auto-generates sections
- SelectionPanel — Multi-select panel with filter chips and summary stats
- OverlayManager — Upload and style KMZ/KML/GeoJSON/Shapefile overlays
- MapControls — Toolbar with pan, zoom, fullscreen, center, draw, layer controls
- Tooltip — Radix-based tooltip (shadcn pattern)

## Data Model

Every entity is an Asset:

```ts
{ id, name, type, status, coordinates: { lat, lng }, properties: {} }
```

## Subpath Exports

- @aai-agency/og-components — Components and types
- @aai-agency/og-components/schemas — Zod validation schemas
- @aai-agency/og-components/utils — Data helpers (formatting, geo, CSV)
- @aai-agency/og-components/services — Storage backends (localStorage, SQLite, in-memory)
- @aai-agency/og-components/machines — XState map state machine
- @aai-agency/og-components/styles.css — Tailwind theme tokens

## Agent Integration

- skills/og-components/SKILL.md — Full agent skill with rules and workflow
